name: Ensure MFA is configured with strong factors
body:
### Security intent

This control validates that **mFA is configured with strong factors** across Okta.

### Access condition reviewed

The assessment focuses on mFA is configured with strong factors. It reviews the identity, credential, role, or policy state that creates the access condition described by the control.

### Practitioner note

Identity findings deserve careful cleanup rather than blind deletion. Confirm ownership and business need, remove unnecessary standing access, and prefer federation, groups, roles, MFA, and short-lived credentials over direct long-lived grants.
description: MFA is configured with strong factors
remediationDescription: Consult the [Okta documentation](https://help.okta.com/en/prod/Content/Topics/Security/mfa/about-mfa.htm) and, depending on your security requirements, disable certain factors from the **Authenticators** page and/or edit the rules of your authentication policies from the **Authentication Policies** page.
